title: SEEK JD Fetcher Input
description: Fetch full job descriptions from a list of SEEK job detail URLs.

urls.title: Job URLs
urls.description: List of SEEK job detail URLs (https://www.seek.com.au/job/{id}).

maxUrls.title: Max URLs
maxUrls.description: Hard cap on URLs to fetch per run. Defaults to 25.

minDelayMs.title: Min delay between pages (ms)
minDelayMs.description: Lower bound of random pause between fetches.

maxDelayMs.title: Max delay between pages (ms)
maxDelayMs.description: Upper bound of random pause between fetches.

includeHtml.title: Include HTML
includeHtml.description: If true, also include descriptionHtml in output. Text-only by default.
